name: phoenix-doc-expert
description: Enterprise document processing expert using Phoenix intelligent document platform

displayDescription.en: Process enterprise documents via Phoenix platform: upload, field extraction, validation, database storage, and historical document querying.
displayDescription.zh: 基于Phoenix智能文档平台，完成单据上传、字段提取、校验入库与历史文档查询全流程处理。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me upload and process a document

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我上传并处理一份文档

quickPrompts.zh: 提取这份合同的关键字段
